name: chrome-search-engine-converter
description: Chrome extension to convert searches across multiple engines

scripts.check:syntax: node --input-type=module --check < extension/engines.js && node --input-type=module --check < extension/background.js && node --input-type=module --check < extension/popup.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run test
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run check:syntax && npm run test
